summary: Document Stamping - Stamp Types and Signature Options: All 6 test scenarios PASSED. Backend API accepts certification/notarization types, signature placeholder works. Frontend correctly shows 2 stamp types with descriptions, signature options only for Certification, TLS logo toggle removed.

frontend_stamp_type_selection: Stamp Type section shows two options: Certification and Notarization - PASS
Certification description: 'Requires signature - for certifying documents' - PASS
Notarization description: 'No signature required - for notarized documents' - PASS
frontend_signature_options: Signature Option section appears when Certification is selected - PASS
Two signature options available: 'Use Digital Signature' and 'Signature Placeholder' - PASS
Signature Option section hidden when Notarization is selected - PASS
frontend_tls_logo_toggle_removed: NO 'Include TLS verification badge' checkbox in Display Options - PASS
Only 'Show my name on stamp' checkbox visible in Display Options - PASS
backend_stamp_type_api: Circle shape with certification type - PASS
Oval shape with notarization type - PASS
TLS logo always included even if show_tls_logo=false - PASS
backend_stamp_verification: GET /api/verify/stamp/{stamp_id} returns valid=true for certification stamp - PASS
Verification response includes stamp_type field - PASS
full_stamping_flow: Stamp ID generated in TLS-YYYYMMDD-XXXX format - PASS
QR code displayed with TLS branding - PASS

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test advocate account.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stamp Types and Signature Options feature verified. Two stamp types (Certification with signature options, Notarization without signature) working correctly. TLS logo toggle removed from frontend - logo always shown. Backend API correctly processes both stamp types with optional signature placeholder. Full stamping flow tested end-to-end.

notarization.description: No signature required - for notarized documents

tls_logo_toggle.expected: No toggle for TLS logo - always shown
tls_logo_toggle.actual: No 'Include TLS verification badge' toggle found in Display Options

display_options.visible_option: Show my name on stamp checkbox only
